falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any daily session within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4950 would violate the August 2024 floor and invalidate the bottoming pattern thesis, confirming distribution rather than accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 39 already indicates elevated complacency; sustained VIX >35 would signal regime change from controlled pullback to panic liquidation, proving the 'bottom' call was a false stabilization

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom coincided with curve steepening/recovery; deeper inversion would confirm recessionary repricing rather than the soft-landing bottom the pattern implies, falsifying the macro setup

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
